id.description: Persistent identifier (PID) of the configuration template.

interoperabilityGuidelineId.description: Persistent identifier (PID) of the interoperability guideline.

nodePID.description: Persistent identifier (PID) of the Node where the template was defined.

formModel.description: Map defining the structure of the configuration template (fields to be filled in by users).

formField.description: Definition of a single field in the configuration template form.

fieldType.description: Type of the form field (e.g. string, URL).

mandatory.description: Indicates whether the field is mandatory.

repeatable.description: Indicates whether the field can be repeated.
